method_description: Coarse cropping/horticulture activity bundle with farm fuel use, irrigation/pumping electricity and process emissions dominated by soils and fertiliser-related nitrous oxide.
evidence_summary: Anchored to official agriculture energy totals, official agriculture emissions totals, and ABS output-value data, with explicit bundle-allocation assumptions.
derivation_method: Coarse residual-sector synthesis. Official agriculture energy and emissions totals are allocated to two output bundles using transparent assumptions so the MVP model can retain agriculture without process-level build-out.
review_notes: Another coarse residual sector block. Useful for whole-economy emissions and liquid-fuels demand, but not robust for commodity-level agricultural supply analysis. Non-energy biological emissions are represented by account_soil_fertiliser_residue_emissions.

method_description: Cropping/horticulture activity bundle with improved fertiliser management, moderate electrification and lower process emissions intensity.
evidence_summary: Anchored to official agriculture energy totals, official agriculture emissions totals, and ABS output-value data, with explicit bundle-allocation assumptions.
derivation_method: Coarse residual-sector synthesis. Official agriculture energy and emissions totals are allocated to two output bundles using transparent assumptions so the MVP model can retain agriculture without process-level build-out.
review_notes: Exploratory mitigation method. Best interpreted as a coarse abatement wedge placeholder. Non-energy biological emissions are represented by account_soil_fertiliser_residue_emissions.
